stemHtml: In the World Area Forecast System, what is a major objective of a Tropical Cyclone Advisory Centre?

options.a: Issue information concerning the state, development and movement of tropical cyclones.
options.b: Predict the chance of tropical cyclones developing in the easterly waves of the ITCZ area.
options.c: Transmit warnings concerning tropical cyclones to operational control centres of airline companies.
options.d: Deliver route advice to airline companies and Air Traffic Control centres in areas with tropical cyclones.
